calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Gems Unlimited, Inc., a California corporation, Garen Ekmekjian and Khoren Ekmekjian.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Manolo Olaso, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jocelyn Richard, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Gems Unlimited, Inc., a California corporation, Garen Ekmekjian or Khoren Ekmekjian.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Fraud, Breach of Contract, Breach of Implied Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing, Conversino, Negligence and Unjust Enrichment was filed on October 19, 2018, and personally served on defendant Khoren Ekmekjian individually, and as Agent of Process for defendant Gems Unlimited, Inc., a California corporation.
Substitute service on defendant Garen Ekmekjian occurred on March 7, 2019 and effectuated on March 18, 2019.
Default as to defendants Gems Unlimited, Inc., a California corporation, and Khoren Ekmekjian was entered on January 25, 2019.
Default was to defendant Garen Ekmekjian was entered on June 6, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 13, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jocelyn Richard, an individual, and against the defaulted defendants Gems Unlimited, Inc., a California corporation, Garen Ekmekjian and Khoren Ekmekjian, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $17,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,768.70.
Costs - $1,267.90.

Total - $20,536.60.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
